1.content:
Growing up in China, you experienced many hardships. As a child you were bullied, made fun of, excluded, and laughed at. Now that you’re older, things haven’t changed much, you get turned down for job opportunities and struggle to lead a healthy love life. It wasn’t necessarily China’s fault, it was more so because you’re the only human in all civilization. No one knows where you came from or how, not even you. Your moved from city to city all your life until a few years back you settled down in an isolated and beautiful village. Better yet, it was protected by and home to the Furious Five and their fearless Dragon Warrior!

Since living here, you’ve been fascinated by the group. Any chance you could get to see them in action, you quickly took it. Hell, you’ve even risked your life by watching battles on the sidelines. You just really couldn’t get enough. There was Viper, the super, slithery star who could neutralize enemies swiftly and efficiently. There was Mantis, the microscopic menace, you are constantly baffled by his ability to take down opponents ten times his size like nothing. There’s also Monkey and Crane, Monkey’s springy agility and Crane’s light, speedy attacks are often showcased together and they clearly make a good team.

Those four are heavily respected in their own lights by the village residents. But everyone knows the two who really steal the show. Master Tigress and the Dragon Warrior himself, Po Ping. Watching these two work their magic is comparable to watching the brush of a world renowned artist glide it’s way across a paper. Safe to say it was art. You one time caught yourself drooling while watching them, doesn’t help you find them incredibly attractive as well.

But today is going to be the best day of your life, because while eating noodles at Po’s old restaurant job, his dad placed a ticket in some lucky customers dish as a contest. That contest? A whole days tour of the Jade Palace and to meet every member of the team! You ate your way through five servings of noodles to be the winner of the ticket. You were about to give up before you got a bitter taste in your mouth. You thought you just ate a bad noodle, but when you spat out the contents, the ticket flew out too! You were the sole winner of the contest and today is the day your dreams come true.

You didn’t pack anything for the experience, you didn’t want no autographs, no gifts, no handouts, you just wanted the day of your life. This seemed even smarter when you realized you had to march your way up miles of stairs just to get to the palace. But you were determined. You clenched your fists and started your trek up the mountain. It was going to be worth it.

*Fast forward to the top*

You almost to the top now, you’ve resorted to crawling on all fours, this was unbearably difficult. Why the hell does this have to be the only way to get to the Jade Palace. An elevator would be nice for visitors at least. The last two steps were the most physical pain you have felt, the last bit of strength you had left was used to pull you up the slightest bit. But you finally made it. And there you lay, feet away from the doors of the famous Jade Palace, catching your breath.

Not expecting someone to be at the door to greet you, you see yourself in, they could be training after all. Upon entry, you are bestowed the site of impeccably large murals that pan from the floors to the ceiling. You are dwarfed by the crimson and gold pillars that are spaced around. While walking through the aisle, you stumble across a row of scrolls. Just to think, the Dragon Warrior probably studies these every day! Awestruck, you can’t help but go up to them. You grab one of them randomly and began to fiddle with it. The urge to open and read it consumes you, but as you read the sacred text, something happens.

What happens?
1.title: The beginning

choices: You decide to go explore the palace
11.content:
You feel a surge of something spiritual run throughout your body and it forces you to drop the scroll, sending a loud clank sound to echo.

The weird force that is consuming you doubles you over and leaves you laying on the ground. You try to fight back against whatever is happening, but it’s no use. Your entire body loses all feeling and control, you can do nothing but take it. And before long, you pass out.

*a few minutes later*

You wake without opening your eyes just yet, and even though you sense you are laying on your back, you are massively dizzy. But as quickly as the dizziness came, it disappeared. Leaving you feeling relatively normal again.

You open your eyes and you are once again greeted by the spectacular ceiling of the Jade Palace, it seemed REALLY far away, however. You thought nothing of it though, brushing it off as just a high part of the palace. You sit up and look around and you can’t believe your eyes. The Jade Palace is HUGE. It didn’t take long to come across the missing puzzle piece that it’s not that the palace grew, but that you shrunk instead. Looking around some more you see that stupid scroll that caused all of this, just sitting there on the floor right next to you.

You are unsure about what to do, after all it’s not like this has happened to anyone before. You start to feel better, though when you think about that this is probably how Mantis feels.

What happens next?
11.title: You shrink!

choices: No, he’s looking at the scroll
1111.content:
While lost in thought, the sound of footsteps grasp your attention. The steps are echoing all around so you can’t quite pinpoint the source of where they are coming from. You start to get scared and paranoid. But as they get closer, they become more clear. You’re slowly making out where they are until you realize that they’re right behind you!

You turn around and you can’t believe your eyes, it’s PO! The Dragon Warrior, even better you hero, is standing right in front of you! You’ve always dreamed of being this close to him, every fight you saw from a distance doesn’t amount to this moment. You would argue that he looks even better at this size.

You catch yourself drooling over him and quickly snap back into reality and focus on the task at hand. You need his attention. Who better to help you than the Dragon Warrior himself?

You start jumping up and down, flailing all about. You even try screaming at the top of your lungs to try to avert his gaze at you. He looks down toward you and you’ve think you’ve done it.

Does he see you?
1111.title: Po

choices: She doesn’t see you and grabs the scroll
1112.content:
While lost in thought, the sound of footsteps grasp your attention. The steps are echoing all around so you can’t quite pinpoint the source of where they are coming from. You start to get scared and paranoid. But as they get closer, they become more clear. You’re slowly making out where they are until you realize that they’re right behind you!

You turn around and you feel the urge to pass out again. Right in front you is the newly giant TIGRESS! All these years you’ve been watching her from afar, and now she’s right here.

Your eyes scale her the same way someone would a skyscraper. First sight you see is the king fu prodigy’s feet, next you work your eyes up her strong, long pantsed legs, then her surely ab-filled abdomen covered by her patented red vest. Following quickly by her big, burly and crossed arms that have probably punched a billion faces. The last thing was her beautiful striped face, you can’t see it very well given your size and position, but you know it’s mesmerizing.

While you were drooling, you notice she’s looking down toward you. Does she see you? Maybe she’s just looking at the scroll. You didn’t want to take your chances and you start jumping up and down while screaming, trying to beckon her attention with your flailing arms.

What does she do?
1112.title: Master Tigress

choices: She ignores the scroll and walks away, possibly stepping on you
Calls for someone else to come look at this
11123.title: Something else

1113332.content: Who let the dogs out
1113332.title: Someone else

112.title: You decide to go explore the palace

1121.content:
You decide to go to the bedrooms in a search to find someone to help your predicament.

As you enter the corridor to the rooms, you realize you don’t know whose is whose. And there’s a bunch of different bedrooms. There’s also a chance that they aren’t even in there right now, they could be training after all. You remember that at some point though they would return if they weren’t here anyways, so this is still the best option.

Picking a room at random, you start to enter. Having difficulty sliding the door over, it takes you numerous breaks and maximum effort. But eventually, you manage to open it just enough for you to squeeze through.

Is the room occupied?
1121.title: The bedrooms

11211.content: Whose room is it then?
11211.title: Yes

choices: Go to his “action figures” of the Furious Five
112111.content:
As you squeeze through the door, you hear sounds similar to those of a child playing. You look around the room and your body gets a surge of tingles as you see your idol, Po! He’s seated on the floor and he seems to be playing with some toys? But as you look a little harder, you see that those toys are actually models of the Fantastic Five! A little strange sure, but you probably shouldn’t think too hard on it, there are more pressing matters to attend to.

You start to walk towards him further, coming from his side. And the more closer you get, the more awestruck you become. It is the Dragon Warrior after all, and at this colossal size, he is basically a god to you.

Before you continue, you have to think about what to do next. Maybe you should get his attention with his toys, or perhaps you could just climb him since he is sitting on the floor. Both of these seems like ok options. But what do you choose?
112111.title: Po

11212.content: Whose room is it tho
11212.title: No

choices: Jump and hide in her drawer
112122.content:
You walk in and immediately recognize that this room belongs to Tigress. The room is relatively bland and empty but it’s her clothes scattered around that easily indicates that this is hers. She must’ve been called to train early because this doesn’t seem typical for her.

You decide to walk around and explore the room, you might be in here for a while in waiting for Tigress and the middle of the floor might not be the best place to stay. As you walk around the room you start to lose yourself in the moment, not believing this is the actual room THE Master Tigress. And experiencing it at this size puts the room at the holy level it deserves to be.

You run around looking at all of her stuff, going through all of her clothes, this is a once in a lifetime opportunity. You find copies of her red vest, baggy pants, and you couldn’t handle yourself when you stumble across her bra and panties. You decide to get up close and personal with her undergarments, they may be on the floor but it seems that they haven’t been worn. She was probably just struggling to find the right pair to wear and throwing the others around.

You feel like a kid on a playground as you mess around more in her room. Next you decide to climb up to her bedside table. The climb seems relatively easy, and with the physically demanding things you’ve already done today it seems like a piece of cake.

It takes a few minutes to get up there, but you didn’t take any breaks and you don’t need to rest at the top, being this tiny seems to be whipping you up into shape. There’s not many things up here, there’s a lamp, a picture frame containing a photo of the group, and a small fan. On the side of the table was a few drawers, you wonder what’s in them.

Before you could explore any further, you start to hear conversation. It sounds like the whole team is off of training and returning to their dorms. You see a silhouette stop before the door to this room, the shadow seems visibly confused at how the door is slightly open. This makes you nervous. Then you see the door start to open. You start to panic and realize you have three options. First, you could just stay on top of the dresser, what’s the worse that could happen? Second, you could hide behind the lamp and bide your time. And third, you could open the drawer below you and hide in there, you have no idea what’s in there but it would easily hide you the best.


What do you choose?
112122.title: Tigress

choices: Just normal clothing like pants and shirts
1121223.content:
You quickly open the drawer just enough for you to fit inside and not too much it’s noticeable.

What’s inside?
1121223.title: Jump and hide in her drawer

choices: Wait for her to get out
11212231.content:
You tumble down into the drawer and are met with a soft cushioned landing. The tiny bit of light creeping in from the crack you just slipped through gives you some visibility to your surroundings. As you look around, you are shocked. This drawer is filled with nothing but her panties and bras! You definitely don’t want her to find you snooping around in here.

From outside the dresser, you hear someone talking, it sounds like she’s talking to herself. You try your best to listen.

“Ugh, why’d we have to train so hard today, I’m exhausted and absolutely drenched in sweat. I definitely need to freshen up,” that sentence is immediately followed by footsteps headed towards the drawer.

You start to panic and begin to burrow yourself into all the different undergarments, you do want to be found, but being found in a place like this can lead to more bad things than good.

You feel like you’re hidden enough and stop moving to not draw any more attention. You hear her open up the drawer and she murmurs to herself as she picks out what clothes to wear. She starts to shift some things around and you feel yourself and whatever you were hiding in start to rise.

“These will be fine, kinda cute too, time to go hop in the shower now, I can’t stand another second of smelling like this,” you start to feel her strides as she walks and the swaying of her arms is making you a little dizzy. She sets the clothing down and you listen as she starts the water. You hear her start to undress and your imagination runs wild, you picture the image of the female tiger in your mind. And you are tempted to go peak, but you still don’t want to get caught just yet. Especially while she gets naked.

Finally, she steps in the shower and you are allowed to leave your cloth prison. When you step out and look back you see that you were lodged in her panties, thankfully she didn’t put them on with you in there.

What do you do next?
11212231.title: Panties and bras

choices: Only one person in here, but who
1122.content:
You decide that your best option would be to head to the training area, cause might as well get their attention as soon as possible, even if you have to interrupt their training.

You start to navigate the halls of the Jade Palace, you’ve never been here before so you get lost quite a few times. There isn’t even any signs to guide you through this king fu labyrinth. And since you’re so little, by the time you get there they may already be completed with their training today and went off to do other things, hopefully that is not the case.

Finally you enter this big empty room which has a mat on the floor, this is probably where they spar. No one’s here right now but that doesn’t alarm you since they have many places they train. This room is most likely where they would have little 1v1 face offs that weren’t significant enough to be in the main dojo. So you decide to move on.

You stumble into many different training rooms while searching for the group. You came across a room with a giant green bowl, a room with spikes everywhere, a room full of dummies and a room that contains more equipment. With all of these findings you still haven’t found the warriors you sought after. You’re hope still hasn’t completely diminished as there is still one room left. This appears to be the main dojo by the looks and sheer size of the door. And through the thickness of the wood you can’t quite tell if you’re hearing grunts or not, they could be in a session right now.

This door alone is probably heavier than anything you’ve ever lifted at normal size, so no way you’d try it now. Desperate to get in, you scale all the way down the door for anything to get you in. And as if the God of Kung if is with you, there’s a long chipped hole not too far up that you can easily squeeze through. You imagine it was created by someone throwing an axe at the door.

You climb up the door and into the hole. You fall out the other side and you’re greeted by a soft landing on a white mat. Looking up is a very large and spacious area, various equipment and weapons laying about.

Are they in here?
1122.title: The training area

info.brief_description: Our character gets shrunk in the universe of Kung Fu Panda. GPs given per addition PLZ ADD
info.description:
This is my first story so I don’t know how well this story will go or how much it will be modified. Anyone who wants can add to the story, it can have bad grammar, short chapters, or typos, just don’t suddenly end the story

WILL GIVE GPs WHEN YOU ADD

If I REALLY like the chapter then I’ll give 1,000 GPs


Rules
No sudden endings
No scat, toilet play, watersports, or sudden death
Main character is male

Allowed
F/M
M/M
Anything really
If you want it, it is encouraged

I encourage ass, but that’s just me

Enjoy!
